summary: Completed testing of Nurekha billing, orders, and WebSocket features. Backend APIs working well (93.8% success), billing frontend verified, but encountered session management issues preventing full orders/chat UI testing.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: WebSocket functionality may work in browser but fails in automated testing environment

minor_issues.issue: Create Order test was skipped in test run
minor_issues.impact: Could not verify order creation via API test

integration_issues.issue: Session cookies expire quickly causing logout during testing

navigation_issues.issue: Could not access orders and chat pages due to session expiration

passed_tests: Billing Page UI (3 plan cards, current plan indicator)

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (billing page working, orders/chat not fully tested due to session issues)

high_priority: Investigate WebSocket connection issues - may be environment-specific rather than code issue
Review session management and cookie settings for better persistence during testing
medium_priority: Add data-testid attributes to Orders and Chat pages for better automated testing
Verify Create Order API endpoint functionality
low_priority: Consider extending session timeout for better user experience
